name: langgraph-subgraph-sse-error
description: Minimal repro for the LangGraph.js EventStreamCallbackHandler run-map bug when a compiled subgraph is used as a node in a parent graph and the parent streams events.

scripts.dev: rm -f log.txt && pnpm dev:backend 2>&1 | tee log.txt & pnpm dev:client 2>&1 | tee -a log.txt & wait
